sql.sql: DO $$ BEGIN IF EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname = 'student_pins_pin_key') THEN ALTER TABLE student_userids RENAME CONSTRAINT student_pins_pin_key TO student_userids_userid_key; ELSIF EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname = 'student_userids_pin_key') THEN ALTER TABLE student_userids RENAME CONSTRAINT student_userids_pin_key TO student_userids_userid_key; END IF; END $$;

DO $$ BEGIN IF EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname = 'user_state_pin_key') THEN ALTER TABLE user_state RENAME CONSTRAINT user_state_pin_key TO user_state_userid_key; ELSIF EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname = 'user_state_pin_unique') THEN ALTER TABLE user_state RENAME CONSTRAINT user_state_pin_unique TO user_state_userid_key; END IF; END $$;
